description: A photograph of a press briefing. A uniformed sheriff in a green shirt speaks at a wooden podium bearing the words Sheriff Grady Judd, with U.S. and state flags to the left. A screen on the right is headed ILLEGAL CRIMINAL GANG, TREN DE ARAGUA OF VENEZUELA and shows a row of five booking photos with names beneath them.
notable_text: Sheriff Grady Judd; ILLEGAL CRIMINAL GANG; TREN DE ARAGUA OF VENEZUELA
